name: llm-brain
description: Filesystem-first, provider-assisted durable memory lifecycle for coding agents.

interface.longDescription: LLM-Brain captures source custody, lets an explicit local provider propose memory, automatically promotes only policy-safe candidates, and builds inspectable OKF retrieval and context packs.
defaultPrompt: Use LLM-Brain to create a filesystem-first project memory with safe automatic promotion.
Use LLM-Brain to bootstrap a new topic brain for this repo.
Use LLM-Brain to generate a project pack for this task.
